message:
🐛 Fix test regression from PR #10398 agentFetch migration (#10417)

PR #10398 replaced raw fetch() calls with agentFetch() from mcp/shared
across ~23 hooks and components. This broke ~130 test files in 3 ways:

1. Tests mocking useDemoMode lacked isDemoModeForced export (needed by
   AgentManager class initializer in useLocalAgent.ts line 83)

2. Tests mocking globalThis.fetch lost interception because agentFetch
   wrapper now handles the call. Fixed by mocking mcp/shared to delegate
   agentFetch back to globalThis.fetch in affected tests.

3. kubectlProxy tests had incomplete ../constants mock (missing
   MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS, DEFAULT_REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS needed by
   transitive imports through useBackendHealth -> mcp/shared -> api.ts)

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
